mods.name: Performance Air Filters
mods.description: Drop-in performance filters for the M177 twin-turbo V8's dual airboxes. Simple upgrade that ensures maximum airflow to both turbochargers.
mods.installNotes: Open both airbox lids and swap paper filters for performance filters. Two filters required — one per bank. No tools needed. 10 minutes.

mods.name: Performance Exhaust (Valved)
mods.description: Let the M177 4.0L twin-turbo V8 sing with a valved exhaust system. Switch between civilized and full-race volume at the touch of a button.
mods.partNumbers: Akrapovic Evolution S-ME/TI/5, Fi Exhaust Valvetronic
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the mid-pipe back. Valved systems wire into factory AMG exhaust mode button. Dual or quad exit options. Titanium systems save significant weight. 2 hours.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the W205 C63 by 15–20mm for a sportier stance. AMG Ride Control (adaptive dampers) remain fully functional.
mods.installNotes: AMG Ride Control-compatible springs required. Spring compressor needed. Alignment after install. The C63 looks significantly better with the factory wheel gap closed.

mods.name: ECU Tune
mods.description: A Stage 1 tune adds 60–100hp to the M177 twin-turbo V8 with no hardware changes. The C63 becomes a genuine supercar killer.
mods.partNumbers: Eurocharged Stage 1, Weistec ECU Tune W.3
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II or bench flash. The M177 has significant headroom from factory. Requires 93+ octane. TCU (transmission) tune recommended for improved shift behavior. Save stock calibration first.

mods.name: Downpipes
mods.description: Replace the factory catalytic converters with high-flow catted or catless downpipes for reduced turbo backpressure and faster spool.
mods.installNotes: Access from below. Two downpipes — one per turbo. Pre-soak all bolts. O2 sensor coding needed for catless. Must retune for full benefit. 3+ hours on a lift.

mods.name: Intake Upgrade (Full System)
mods.description: Replace the complete intake system with carbon fiber intakes for maximum airflow. Significant improvement over the restrictive factory airbox lids.
mods.partNumbers: Weistec Carbon Fiber Intake, Eventuri EVE-C63-CF-INT
mods.installNotes: Remove factory airboxes completely. Install carbon fiber intake housings with performance filters. Ensure heat shielding is intact to prevent hot air ingestion. 1 hour. Pairs well with tune.

mods.name: Turbo Upgrade
mods.description: Upgraded turbochargers push the M177 beyond 650hp. The factory engine block and internals handle this power level with a proper tune.
mods.partNumbers: Weistec W.4 Turbo Upgrade, Pure Turbos C63
mods.installNotes: Engine must be partially removed for turbo access. Requires upgraded intercooler, fuel system upgrades, and custom tune. Transmission may need upgraded clutch packs. 20+ hour professional job.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers replace the factory air suspension (if equipped) or standard springs for precise ride height and damping control.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35225053, Ohlins Road & Track BMS MI40
mods.installNotes: Airmatic-equipped cars require conversion — air suspension delete and coilover installation. Standard suspension cars are straightforward. Full alignment and corner balance required.
